content.text:
I have now read every single source file in the project. Here is my comprehensive analysis:

---

## Complete Project Analysis: D:/apk核对宝 (配音文字核对宝)

### 1. Full Project Structure

```
D:/apk核对宝/
|-- README.md                          # Project documentation
|-- buildozer.spec                     # Buildozer (Kivy) build config
|-- intent_filters.xml                 # Android Share Intent declarations
|-- build_apk.py                       # Build helper script
|-- funasr_server_patch.py             # FunASR server-side proxy (for LAN use)
|-- .gitignore
|-- .github/workflows/build.yml        # GitHub Actions CI for APK building
|-- 配音文字核对宝_v1.0.apk              # Pre-built APK artifact
|
|-- app/                               # Kivy-based app (Buildozer path)
|   |-- main.py                        # Main Kivy application + UI (495 lines)
|   |-- core/
|   |   |-- __init__.py                # Empty
|   |   |-- transcribe.py             # Multi-engine ASR transcription (372 lines)
|   |   |-- compare.py                # Text comparison algorithm (198 lines)
|   |   |-- docx_util.py              # Word/text document parser (45 lines)
|   |   |-- model_download.py         # Sherpa-ONNX model downloader (104 lines)
|   |   |-- wechat_import.py          # WeChat Share Intent file import (105 lines)
|   |-- models/paraformer/
|   |   |-- model.int8.onnx           # Bundled Paraformer ONNX model (in .gitignore)
|   |   |-- tokens.txt                # Token vocabulary for Paraformer
|   |-- ui/
|       |-- __init__.py               # Empty
|
|-- android/                           # Alternative native Android build (Chaquopy)
    |-- build.gradle                   # Root Gradle config (Chaquopy 15.0.1)
    |-- settings.gradle
    |-- gradlew, gradlew.bat
    |-- app/
        |-- build.gradle              # App Gradle config (Python 3.11, sherpa-onnx)
        |-- src/main/
            |-- AndroidManifest.xml   # Permissions + intent filters
            |-- java/com/voicedoc/app/
            |   |-- MainActivity.java # Native Android activity (169 lines)
            |-- python/
            |   |-- engine.py         # Python engine called via Chaquopy (176 lines)
            |-- res/
                |-- layout/activity_main.xml
                |-- values/strings.xml
                |-- values/themes.xml
```

### 2. How the App Works

The project contains **two separate build approaches** for the same app concept:

#### Approach A: Kivy/Buildozer (`app/main.py`)

- **`app/main.py`** -- A complete Kivy application with inline KV language UI definition.
- The `VoiceDocApp` class extends `kivy.app.App`.
- **UI**: Two screens managed by a `ScreenManager`:
  - **Home screen**: Audio file picker, document file picker, "Start Compare" button, ASR engine selector (Spinner with 5 options), FunASR server IP input, progress bar, and status text.
  - **Result screen**: Summary label, a `RecycleView` list of diff items (each showing diff type and detail), and a "Back" button.
- **Workflow**:
  1. User picks an audio file and a document file (via Android file picker or desktop `plyer.filechooser`).
  2. User clicks "Start Compare" which spawns a background thread (`_do_compare`).
  3. The thread calls `transcribe_audio()` from `core/transcribe.py` to get text + timestamps.
  4. It parses the document via `core/docx_util.py` (`.docx` or `.txt`).
  5. It runs `compare_texts()` from `core/compare.py` to find differences.
  6. Results are displayed in the result screen with diff items showing mismatch/missing/extra with timestamps.
- **WeChat Import**: On Android, checks the launch Intent for `ACTION_SEND`/`ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE` via `core/wechat_import.py`, copies shared files to app storage, and auto-classifies them as audio or document.
- **Config**: Persists ASR provider choice and API keys to a JSON config file.

#### Approach B: Native Android + Chaquopy (`android/`)

- **`android/app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java`** -- A standard Android `AppCompatActivity` with a native XML layout.
- Uses **Chaquopy** (version 15.0.1) to embed Python 3.11 and call Python code from Java.
- **`android/app/src/main/python/engine.py`** -- A self-contained Python module that duplicates the core logic (docx parsing, text comparison, sherpa-onnx transcription, Baidu API fallback).
- Java calls `engine.run_compare(audioPath, docPath, filesDir)` which returns a dict with `summary` and `details`.
- Has its own native Android layout (`activity_main.xml`) with pick buttons, compare button, progress bar, and result text view.
- Handles WeChat Share Intent directly in Java (`handleShareIntent`).

### 3. Build Configuration

#### Buildozer (Kivy approach) -- `buildozer.spec`

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| App title | 配音文字核对宝 |
| Package name | voicedoccompare |
| Package domain | com.voicedoc |
| Source dir | `./app` |
| Included extensions | py, png, jpg, kv, atlas, json, onnx, txt |
| Version | 1.0.0 |
| Requirements | `python3, kivy, requests, pyjnius, android, pillow, sherpa-onnx` |
| Permissions | INTERNET, READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, RECORD_AUDIO |
| Target API | 33 |
| Min API | 24 |
| NDK | 25b |
| Architecture | arm64-v8a |
| Intent filters | `intent_filters.xml` |
| Orientation | portrait |

#### Gradle (Chaquopy approach) -- `android/app/build.gradle`

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Application ID | com.voicedoc.app |
| Compile SDK | 34 |
| Min SDK | 24 |
| Target SDK | 34 |
| Python version | 3.11 |
| Python pip deps | `requests`, `sherpa-onnx` |
| ABI filter | arm64-v8a |
| Chaquopy version | 15.0.1 |
| Gradle version | 8.2 |
| Android Gradle Plugin | 8.2.0 |
| Extract packages | `sherpa_onnx` |

#### `intent_filters.xml`

Declares Android intent filters for receiving shared files:
- `ACTION_SEND` with `audio/*` (audio files)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document` (docx)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `application/msword` (doc)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `text/plain` (txt)
- `ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE` with `*/*` (multiple files of any type)

#### GitHub Actions -- `.github/workflows/build.yml`

- Triggers on push to `main` or manual dispatch.
- Runs on `ubuntu-latest` with Python 3.11 and Java 17 (Temurin).
- Installs `buildozer`, `cython`, `kivy`.
- Runs `buildozer android debug` with a 60-minute timeout.
- Uploads the resulting APK as an artifact.

### 4. Dependencies

#### Python dependencies (Buildozer path):
- **kivy** -- Cross-platform UI framework
- **requests** -- HTTP client for API calls (Baidu, Groq, OpenAI, FunASR)
- **pyjnius** -- Java/Android bridge (for Android Intent handling, file pickers)
- **android** -- Kivy's Android support module (storage paths, etc.)
- **pillow** -- Image processing (listed but not directly used in visible code)
- **sherpa-onnx** -- Offline speech recognition inference engine

#### Python dependencies (Chaquopy path):
- **requests** -- HTTP client
- **sherpa-onnx** -- Offline speech recognition

#### Optional/gracefully-degraded dependencies:
- **python-docx** (`docx`) -- For Word document parsing; falls back to raw zipfile+XML parsing if unavailable
- **jieba** -- Chinese text segmentation; falls back to character-level segmentation if unavailable
- **pypinyin** -- Pinyin comparison for homophone detection; disabled if unavailable
- **plyer** -- Desktop file chooser (only used in non-Android debug mode)
- **flask** -- Used only in `funasr_server_patch.py` (server-side, not in the APK)

#### External tools:
- **ffmpeg** -- Audio format conversion and preprocessing (called via `subprocess`)
- **silk_decoder** -- WeChat SILK audio format decoder (optional fallback)

### 5. How sherpa-onnx Is Used

Sherpa-ONNX is the **primary offline ASR engine** in this app. Here is how it is used in both codepaths:

#### In `app/core/transcribe.py` (function `transcribe_sherpa_offline`, lines 172-245):

1. **Import**: `import sherpa_onnx` -- raises an `ImportError` with instructions if not installed.

2. **Model location resolution** (priority order):
   - Built-in model bundled in the APK at `app/models/paraformer/model.int8.onnx`
   - Android app storage: `app_storage_path()/models/paraformer/`
   - Desktop fallback: `~/.sherpa-onnx/paraformer/`

3. **Auto-download**: If `model.int8.onnx` is not found, triggers `core.model_download.download_model()` which downloads the **sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14** model (~80MB) from GitHub releases (with Chinese mirror fallback via `hub.nuaa.cf` and `ghproxy.com`). The download is a `.tar.bz2` archive that gets extracted with the top-level directory stripped.

4. **Recognizer creation**:
   ```python
   recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
       paraformer=model_path,       # model.int8.onnx
       tokens=tokens_path,          # tokens.txt
       num_threads=4,
       sample_rate=16000,
       decoding_method='greedy_search',
   )
   ```

5. **Audio reading**: Opens the preprocessed WAV file (must be mono 16-bit PCM at 16kHz), reads raw frames, unpacks to int16, and normalizes to float32 [-1, 1].

6. **Inference**:
   ```python
   stream = recognizer.create_stream()
   stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
   recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
   text = stream.result.text.strip()
   ```

7. **Timestamp extraction**: If `stream.result.timestamps` is available, maps character-level timestamps from the Paraformer output into a list of word-level timestamp dicts `{'word': ch, 'start': ts, 'end': ts, 'confidence': 1.0}`.

8. **Returns**: `(text, words)` where `words` is a list of timestamp dicts or `None`.

#### In `android/app/src/main/python/engine.py` (function `transcribe_sherpa`, lines 105-122):

A simplified version that does the same thing without timestamp extraction:
```python
recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
    paraformer=model_path, tokens=tokens_path,
    num_threads=4, sample_rate=16000, decoding_method='greedy_search')
```
Same audio reading and inference pattern, but returns only `stream.result.text.strip()` (no timestamps).

#### Model used:
- **Paraformer** (FunASR's Paraformer model exported to ONNX format)
- Specifically: `sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14` (Chinese/English bilingual)
- Quantized to INT8 (`model.int8.onnx`) for mobile efficiency
- The model file and `tokens.txt` are bundled at `app/models/paraformer/`

#### ASR Engine Selection:

The app supports 5 ASR providers (defined in `ASR_MAP` in `main.py`):

| UI Label | Internal Key | Implementation |
|----------|-------------|----------------|
| 离线识别(无需网络) | `sherpa_offline` | sherpa-onnx Paraformer (local) |
| FunASR(局域网) | `funasr` | HTTP to LAN FunASR server |
| 百度语音(内置) | `baidu_builtin` | Baidu Cloud ASR API (hardcoded credentials) |
| Groq Whisper | `groq_whisper` | Groq API (whisper-large-v3) |
| OpenAI Whisper | `openai_whisper` | OpenAI API (whisper-1) |

The default ASR provider in the config is `sherpa_offline` (line 308 of `main.py`), making sherpa-onnx the primary/default recognition engine.

#### Chaquopy integration detail:

In the Gradle build (`android/app/build.gradle`), sherpa-onnx is configured specially:
```groovy
chaquopy {
    extractPackages = ["sherpa_onnx"]
}
```
This tells Chaquopy to extract the `sherpa_onnx` package from the APK to the filesystem at runtime (required because sherpa-onnx contains native `.so` libraries that need to be loaded via `dlopen`).

---

## Complete Project Analysis: D:/apk核对宝 (配音文字核对宝)

### 1. Full Project Structure

```
D:/apk核对宝/
|-- README.md                          # Project documentation
|-- buildozer.spec                     # Buildozer (Kivy) build config
|-- intent_filters.xml                 # Android Share Intent declarations
|-- build_apk.py                       # Build helper script
|-- funasr_server_patch.py             # FunASR server-side proxy (for LAN use)
|-- .gitignore
|-- .github/workflows/build.yml        # GitHub Actions CI for APK building
|-- 配音文字核对宝_v1.0.apk              # Pre-built APK artifact
|
|-- app/                               # Kivy-based app (Buildozer path)
|   |-- main.py                        # Main Kivy application + UI (495 lines)
|   |-- core/
|   |   |-- __init__.py                # Empty
|   |   |-- transcribe.py             # Multi-engine ASR transcription (372 lines)
|   |   |-- compare.py                # Text comparison algorithm (198 lines)
|   |   |-- docx_util.py              # Word/text document parser (45 lines)
|   |   |-- model_download.py         # Sherpa-ONNX model downloader (104 lines)
|   |   |-- wechat_import.py          # WeChat Share Intent file import (105 lines)
|   |-- models/paraformer/
|   |   |-- model.int8.onnx           # Bundled Paraformer ONNX model (in .gitignore)
|   |   |-- tokens.txt                # Token vocabulary for Paraformer
|   |-- ui/
|       |-- __init__.py               # Empty
|
|-- android/                           # Alternative native Android build (Chaquopy)
    |-- build.gradle                   # Root Gradle config (Chaquopy 15.0.1)
    |-- settings.gradle
    |-- gradlew, gradlew.bat
    |-- app/
        |-- build.gradle              # App Gradle config (Python 3.11, sherpa-onnx)
        |-- src/main/
            |-- AndroidManifest.xml   # Permissions + intent filters
            |-- java/com/voicedoc/app/
            |   |-- MainActivity.java # Native Android activity (169 lines)
            |-- python/
            |   |-- engine.py         # Python engine called via Chaquopy (176 lines)
            |-- res/
                |-- layout/activity_main.xml
                |-- values/strings.xml
                |-- values/themes.xml
```

### 2. How the App Works

The project contains **two separate build approaches** for the same app concept:

#### Approach A: Kivy/Buildozer (`app/main.py`)

- **`app/main.py`** -- A complete Kivy application with inline KV language UI definition.
- The `VoiceDocApp` class extends `kivy.app.App`.
- **UI**: Two screens managed by a `ScreenManager`:
  - **Home screen**: Audio file picker, document file picker, "Start Compare" button, ASR engine selector (Spinner with 5 options), FunASR server IP input, progress bar, and status text.
  - **Result screen**: Summary label, a `RecycleView` list of diff items (each showing diff type and detail), and a "Back" button.
- **Workflow**:
  1. User picks an audio file and a document file (via Android file picker or desktop `plyer.filechooser`).
  2. User clicks "Start Compare" which spawns a background thread (`_do_compare`).
  3. The thread calls `transcribe_audio()` from `core/transcribe.py` to get text + timestamps.
  4. It parses the document via `core/docx_util.py` (`.docx` or `.txt`).
  5. It runs `compare_texts()` from `core/compare.py` to find differences.
  6. Results are displayed in the result screen with diff items showing mismatch/missing/extra with timestamps.
- **WeChat Import**: On Android, checks the launch Intent for `ACTION_SEND`/`ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE` via `core/wechat_import.py`, copies shared files to app storage, and auto-classifies them as audio or document.
- **Config**: Persists ASR provider choice and API keys to a JSON config file.

#### Approach B: Native Android + Chaquopy (`android/`)

- **`android/app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java`** -- A standard Android `AppCompatActivity` with a native XML layout.
- Uses **Chaquopy** (version 15.0.1) to embed Python 3.11 and call Python code from Java.
- **`android/app/src/main/python/engine.py`** -- A self-contained Python module that duplicates the core logic (docx parsing, text comparison, sherpa-onnx transcription, Baidu API fallback).
- Java calls `engine.run_compare(audioPath, docPath, filesDir)` which returns a dict with `summary` and `details`.
- Has its own native Android layout (`activity_main.xml`) with pick buttons, compare button, progress bar, and result text view.
- Handles WeChat Share Intent directly in Java (`handleShareIntent`).

### 3. Build Configuration

#### Buildozer (Kivy approach) -- `buildozer.spec`

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| App title | 配音文字核对宝 |
| Package name | voicedoccompare |
| Package domain | com.voicedoc |
| Source dir | `./app` |
| Included extensions | py, png, jpg, kv, atlas, json, onnx, txt |
| Version | 1.0.0 |
| Requirements | `python3, kivy, requests, pyjnius, android, pillow, sherpa-onnx` |
| Permissions | INTERNET, READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE, RECORD_AUDIO |
| Target API | 33 |
| Min API | 24 |
| NDK | 25b |
| Architecture | arm64-v8a |
| Intent filters | `intent_filters.xml` |
| Orientation | portrait |

#### Gradle (Chaquopy approach) -- `android/app/build.gradle`

| Setting | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Application ID | com.voicedoc.app |
| Compile SDK | 34 |
| Min SDK | 24 |
| Target SDK | 34 |
| Python version | 3.11 |
| Python pip deps | `requests`, `sherpa-onnx` |
| ABI filter | arm64-v8a |
| Chaquopy version | 15.0.1 |
| Gradle version | 8.2 |
| Android Gradle Plugin | 8.2.0 |
| Extract packages | `sherpa_onnx` |

#### `intent_filters.xml`

Declares Android intent filters for receiving shared files:
- `ACTION_SEND` with `audio/*` (audio files)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document` (docx)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `application/msword` (doc)
- `ACTION_SEND` with `text/plain` (txt)
- `ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE` with `*/*` (multiple files of any type)

#### GitHub Actions -- `.github/workflows/build.yml`

- Triggers on push to `main` or manual dispatch.
- Runs on `ubuntu-latest` with Python 3.11 and Java 17 (Temurin).
- Installs `buildozer`, `cython`, `kivy`.
- Runs `buildozer android debug` with a 60-minute timeout.
- Uploads the resulting APK as an artifact.

### 4. Dependencies

#### Python dependencies (Buildozer path):
- **kivy** -- Cross-platform UI framework
- **requests** -- HTTP client for API calls (Baidu, Groq, OpenAI, FunASR)
- **pyjnius** -- Java/Android bridge (for Android Intent handling, file pickers)
- **android** -- Kivy's Android support module (storage paths, etc.)
- **pillow** -- Image processing (listed but not directly used in visible code)
- **sherpa-onnx** -- Offline speech recognition inference engine

#### Python dependencies (Chaquopy path):
- **requests** -- HTTP client
- **sherpa-onnx** -- Offline speech recognition

#### Optional/gracefully-degraded dependencies:
- **python-docx** (`docx`) -- For Word document parsing; falls back to raw zipfile+XML parsing if unavailable
- **jieba** -- Chinese text segmentation; falls back to character-level segmentation if unavailable
- **pypinyin** -- Pinyin comparison for homophone detection; disabled if unavailable
- **plyer** -- Desktop file chooser (only used in non-Android debug mode)
- **flask** -- Used only in `funasr_server_patch.py` (server-side, not in the APK)

#### External tools:
- **ffmpeg** -- Audio format conversion and preprocessing (called via `subprocess`)
- **silk_decoder** -- WeChat SILK audio format decoder (optional fallback)

### 5. How sherpa-onnx Is Used

Sherpa-ONNX is the **primary offline ASR engine** in this app. Here is how it is used in both codepaths:

#### In `app/core/transcribe.py` (function `transcribe_sherpa_offline`, lines 172-245):

1. **Import**: `import sherpa_onnx` -- raises an `ImportError` with instructions if not installed.

2. **Model location resolution** (priority order):
   - Built-in model bundled in the APK at `app/models/paraformer/model.int8.onnx`
   - Android app storage: `app_storage_path()/models/paraformer/`
   - Desktop fallback: `~/.sherpa-onnx/paraformer/`

3. **Auto-download**: If `model.int8.onnx` is not found, triggers `core.model_download.download_model()` which downloads the **sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14** model (~80MB) from GitHub releases (with Chinese mirror fallback via `hub.nuaa.cf` and `ghproxy.com`). The download is a `.tar.bz2` archive that gets extracted with the top-level directory stripped.

4. **Recognizer creation**:
   ```python
   recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
       paraformer=model_path,       # model.int8.onnx
       tokens=tokens_path,          # tokens.txt
       num_threads=4,
       sample_rate=16000,
       decoding_method='greedy_search',
   )
   ```

5. **Audio reading**: Opens the preprocessed WAV file (must be mono 16-bit PCM at 16kHz), reads raw frames, unpacks to int16, and normalizes to float32 [-1, 1].

6. **Inference**:
   ```python
   stream = recognizer.create_stream()
   stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
   recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
   text = stream.result.text.strip()
   ```

7. **Timestamp extraction**: If `stream.result.timestamps` is available, maps character-level timestamps from the Paraformer output into a list of word-level timestamp dicts `{'word': ch, 'start': ts, 'end': ts, 'confidence': 1.0}`.

8. **Returns**: `(text, words)` where `words` is a list of timestamp dicts or `None`.

#### In `android/app/src/main/python/engine.py` (function `transcribe_sherpa`, lines 105-122):

A simplified version that does the same thing without timestamp extraction:
```python
recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
    paraformer=model_path, tokens=tokens_path,
    num_threads=4, sample_rate=16000, decoding_method='greedy_search')
```
Same audio reading and inference pattern, but returns only `stream.result.text.strip()` (no timestamps).

#### Model used:
- **Paraformer** (FunASR's Paraformer model exported to ONNX format)
- Specifically: `sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14` (Chinese/English bilingual)
- Quantized to INT8 (`model.int8.onnx`) for mobile efficiency
- The model file and `tokens.txt` are bundled at `app/models/paraformer/`

#### ASR Engine Selection:

The app supports 5 ASR providers (defined in `ASR_MAP` in `main.py`):

| UI Label | Internal Key | Implementation |
|----------|-------------|----------------|
| 离线识别(无需网络) | `sherpa_offline` | sherpa-onnx Paraformer (local) |
| FunASR(局域网) | `funasr` | HTTP to LAN FunASR server |
| 百度语音(内置) | `baidu_builtin` | Baidu Cloud ASR API (hardcoded credentials) |
| Groq Whisper | `groq_whisper` | Groq API (whisper-large-v3) |
| OpenAI Whisper | `openai_whisper` | OpenAI API (whisper-1) |

The default ASR provider in the config is `sherpa_offline` (line 308 of `main.py`), making sherpa-onnx the primary/default recognition engine.

#### Chaquopy integration detail:

In the Gradle build (`android/app/build.gradle`), sherpa-onnx is configured specially:
```groovy
chaquopy {
    extractPackages = ["sherpa_onnx"]
}
```
This tells Chaquopy to extract the `sherpa_onnx` package from the APK to the filesystem at runtime (required because sherpa-onnx contains native `.so` libraries that need to be loaded via `dlopen`).

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:label="配音文字核对宝"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.VoiceDocCompare">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的音频文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="audio/*" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的文档文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/msword" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="text/plain" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收多文件分享 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND_MULTIPLE" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="*/*" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>

"""Android端Python引擎 - 被Java通过Chaquopy调用
   集成 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 离线语音识别"""
import os, re, json, base64, wave, struct
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.parse import urlencode


# ===== 文档解析 =====
def parse_docx(filepath):
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    if ext == '.txt':
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    import zipfile
    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    paragraphs = []
    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
        if line:
            paragraphs.append(line)
    return paragraphs


# ===== 文本规范化 =====
_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}

def _norm(text):
    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)

def _segment(text):
    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]

def _num_reading(text):
    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)

def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    if not a_c or not b_c:
        return False
    if a_c == b_c:
        return True
    return _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c)


# ===== 对比算法 =====
def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)

    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    diffs = []

    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
        if tag == 'equal':
            continue
        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])

        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
            continue
        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
            continue

        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
        if tag == 'replace':
            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
        elif tag == 'delete':
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
        else:
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))

    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)

    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
    return summary, diffs


# ===== Sherpa-ONNX 离线语音识别 =====
def _extract_assets_model(files_dir):
    """从 APK assets 提取模型文件到 filesDir（仅首次）"""
    model_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'models', 'paraformer')
    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if os.path.exists(model_path) and os.path.exists(tokens_path):
        return model_path, tokens_path

    # 用 Java 从 assets 提取
    os.makedirs(model_dir, exist_ok=True)

    try:
        from java import jclass
        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getContext()
        asset_mgr = context.getAssets()

        for fname in ['model.int8.onnx', 'tokens.txt']:
            asset_path = 'models/paraformer/' + fname
            out_path = os.path.join(model_dir, fname)
            if os.path.exists(out_path):
                continue

            inp = asset_mgr.open(asset_path)
            with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
                buf = bytearray(8192)
                while True:
                    n = inp.read(buf)
                    if n == -1:
                        break
                    f.write(buf[:n])
            inp.close()
    except Exception as e:
        raise Exception('模型提取失败: %s' % str(e))

    return model_path, tokens_path


def transcribe_sherpa(filepath, files_dir):
    """使用 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 进行离线语音识别"""
    import sherpa_onnx

    model_path, tokens_path = _extract_assets_model(files_dir)

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    # 读取 WAV 文件
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1, '需要单声道音频'
        assert wf.getsampwidth() == 2, '需要16位音频'
        n_frames = wf.getnframes()
        raw = wf.readframes(n_frames)

    samples = struct.unpack('<%dh' % n_frames, raw)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
    text = stream.result.text.strip()

    return text


# ===== 百度语音识别（备用在线方案） =====
def _http_post_json(url, data, timeout=60):
    body = json.dumps(data).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def _http_post_form(url, params, timeout=10):
    body = urlencode(params).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body)
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
    """百度语音识别（内置密钥）"""
    data = _http_post_form('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token', {
        'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
        'client_id': 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W',
        'client_secret': 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'
    })
    token = data.get('access_token', '')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    result = _http_post_json('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
    })
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception('百度识别失败: %s' % result.get('err_msg', '未知错误'))


# ===== Java调用入口 =====
def run_compare(audio_path, doc_path, files_dir):
    """主入口：优先使用 Sherpa-ONNX 离线识别，失败则回退到百度在线"""
    # 转录 - 优先 Sherpa-ONNX 离线
    try:
        audio_text = transcribe_sherpa(audio_path, files_dir)
    except Exception as e:
        # 回退到百度在线识别
        try:
            audio_text = transcribe_baidu(audio_path)
        except Exception as e2:
            raise Exception('语音识别失败 (离线: %s, 在线: %s)' % (str(e), str(e2)))

    # 解析文档
    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

    # 对比
    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)

    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}

"""Android端Python引擎 - 被Java通过Chaquopy调用
   集成 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 离线语音识别"""
import os, re, json, base64, wave, struct
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.parse import urlencode


# ===== 文档解析 =====
def parse_docx(filepath):
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    if ext == '.txt':
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    import zipfile
    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    paragraphs = []
    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
        if line:
            paragraphs.append(line)
    return paragraphs


# ===== 文本规范化 =====
_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}

def _norm(text):
    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)

def _segment(text):
    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]

def _num_reading(text):
    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)

def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    if not a_c or not b_c:
        return False
    if a_c == b_c:
        return True
    return _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c)


# ===== 对比算法 =====
def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)

    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    diffs = []

    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
        if tag == 'equal':
            continue
        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])

        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
            continue
        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
            continue

        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
        if tag == 'replace':
            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
        elif tag == 'delete':
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
        else:
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))

    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)

    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
    return summary, diffs


# ===== Sherpa-ONNX 离线语音识别 =====
def _extract_assets_model(files_dir):
    """从 APK assets 提取模型文件到 filesDir（仅首次）"""
    model_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'models', 'paraformer')
    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if os.path.exists(model_path) and os.path.exists(tokens_path):
        return model_path, tokens_path

    # 用 Java 从 assets 提取
    os.makedirs(model_dir, exist_ok=True)

    try:
        from java import jclass
        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getContext()
        asset_mgr = context.getAssets()

        for fname in ['model.int8.onnx', 'tokens.txt']:
            asset_path = 'models/paraformer/' + fname
            out_path = os.path.join(model_dir, fname)
            if os.path.exists(out_path):
                continue

            inp = asset_mgr.open(asset_path)
            with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
                buf = bytearray(8192)
                while True:
                    n = inp.read(buf)
                    if n == -1:
                        break
                    f.write(buf[:n])
            inp.close()
    except Exception as e:
        raise Exception('模型提取失败: %s' % str(e))

    return model_path, tokens_path


def transcribe_sherpa(filepath, files_dir):
    """使用 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 进行离线语音识别"""
    import sherpa_onnx

    model_path, tokens_path = _extract_assets_model(files_dir)

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    # 读取 WAV 文件
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1, '需要单声道音频'
        assert wf.getsampwidth() == 2, '需要16位音频'
        n_frames = wf.getnframes()
        raw = wf.readframes(n_frames)

    samples = struct.unpack('<%dh' % n_frames, raw)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
    text = stream.result.text.strip()

    return text


# ===== 百度语音识别（备用在线方案） =====
def _http_post_json(url, data, timeout=60):
    body = json.dumps(data).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def _http_post_form(url, params, timeout=10):
    body = urlencode(params).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body)
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
    """百度语音识别（内置密钥）"""
    data = _http_post_form('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token', {
        'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
        'client_id': 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W',
        'client_secret': 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'
    })
    token = data.get('access_token', '')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    result = _http_post_json('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
    })
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception('百度识别失败: %s' % result.get('err_msg', '未知错误'))


# ===== Java调用入口 =====
def run_compare(audio_path, doc_path, files_dir):
    """主入口：优先使用 Sherpa-ONNX 离线识别，失败则回退到百度在线"""
    # 转录 - 优先 Sherpa-ONNX 离线
    try:
        audio_text = transcribe_sherpa(audio_path, files_dir)
    except Exception as e:
        # 回退到百度在线识别
        try:
            audio_text = transcribe_baidu(audio_path)
        except Exception as e2:
            raise Exception('语音识别失败 (离线: %s, 在线: %s)' % (str(e), str(e2)))

    # 解析文档
    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

    # 对比
    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)

    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}

content.text:
问题是系统的 Python 是 3.14（`C:\Python314`），`cgi` 模块在 3.13 被移除了。Chaquopy 内部用的 pip 不兼容 Python 3.14。需要确认 Chaquopy 创建的 Python 环境。

问题在于 Chaquopy 使用宿主机的 Python 来运行 pip 安装依赖。系统 Python 3.14 太新了。让我检查可用的 Python 版本：

content.thinking:
The system only has Python 3.14 installed. Chaquopy 15.0.1's pip uses `cgi` module which was removed in Python 3.13. We need to either:

1. Install Python 3.11 or 3.12 on Windows
2. Use a different approach

The user also mentioned "Ubuntu安装包放在了" - they have WSL Ubuntu. Maybe we should use the WSL approach with buildozer instead.

Actually wait - let me think about this differently. Chaquopy creates its own embedded Python for Android (cross-compiled), but it uses the HOST Python to run pip for downloading packages. 

If the host Python is 3.14, the pip version bundled with Chaquopy won't work because `cgi` was removed. I could install Python 3.12 on Windows for Chaquopy to use, try the WSL + buildozer approach, or set the CHAQUOPY_PYTHON environment variable to point to a Python 3.12 installation. The funasr-venv already uses Python 3.12, but Chaquopy might not automatically use a venv Python - I need to check if there's a way to configure Chaquopy to use a specific Python version.

Looking at the error path, Chaquopy is creating its own Python environment, but it seems to be pulling from the system Python 3.14 installation. The user mentioned Ubuntu and is about to share where an Ubuntu installation package is located, so let me wait for that information before deciding whether to pursue the Windows Python 3.12 installation or pivot to a different approach entirely.

Actually, I should just commit to a solution rather than waiting. Let me try configuring Chaquopy's `buildPython` property to point to a Python 3.12 installation instead of relying on the system Python.

content.text: 问题找到了：系统只有 Python 3.14，但 Chaquopy 的 pip 不兼容 3.14（`cgi` 模块已移除）。我可以让 Chaquopy 使用 funasr-venv 的 Python 3.12 来运行构建。

The issue is that Chaquopy is trying to build sherpa-onnx from source using cmake, but:
1. cmake is not found on the system (`[WinError 2]` = file not found)
2. Even if cmake were available, sherpa-onnx requires native compilation with Android NDK for arm64-v8a, which can't be done through Chaquopy's pip install on Windows

The key issue is that Chaquopy's pip repository (`https://chaquo.com/pypi-13.1`) doesn't have a pre-built wheel for sherpa-onnx for Android/arm64-v8a. 

Since sherpa-onnx isn't available as a pre-built package in Chaquopy's index, I need to explore alternatives: calling the native Android AAR/JAR directly through JNI, using buildozer in WSL since the user has Ubuntu available, or finding another way to get the pre-compiled Android binaries. wheel** if one exists on PyPI

Let me check if sherpa-onnx has pre-built Android wheels on PyPI...

Actually, looking at sherpa-onnx's PyPI page, they provide wheels for various platforms. For Android, there's `sherpa_onnx-xxx-cp38-cp38-android_aarch64.whl` type wheels. But Chaquopy has its own way of handling this.

Actually, wait - sherpa-onnx provides pre-built Android wheels! From their GitHub releases. If I can download the correct wheel and install it via Chaquopy's `pip { options "--find-links", "..." }`, it might work.

But actually, the simplest approach might be:
1. Use sherpa-onnx's Android library (Java/JNI) directly instead of the Python wrapper
2. Or use the WSL+ buildozer approach (user said Ubuntu is already available)
3. Or manually implement the sherpa-onnx call using ctypes/JNI

Since the user mentioned the Ubuntu installer is already on their D drive and they've downloaded it before, let me think about whether using sherpa-onnx's Android AAR library directly from Java would be more reliable than going through Python. The user's app currently uses Chaquopy to run Python for both ASR and text comparison, so I need to consider whether moving ASR to native Android code would break that architecture. So Java would handle the ASR directly via sherpa-onnx's Android library, then pass the recognized text to Python for comparison. I'm checking the sherpa-onnx repository for the correct Maven coordinates to add as a Gradle dependency.

Chaquopy 无法在 Windows 上编译 sherpa-onnx 的原生库（需要 cmake + Android NDK 交叉编译）。我需要换个策略：**直接用 sherpa-onnx 的 Android AAR 库**从 Java 侧调用，不通过 Python。

让我查找 sherpa-onnx 的 Android Maven 依赖：

input.query: sherpa-onnx Android AAR Maven gradle dependency 2025 2026

content.content:
Web search results for query: "sherpa-onnx Android AAR Maven gradle dependency 2025 2026"

The `sherpa-onnx` project provides AAR (Android Archive) files for use in Android applications, and these are often integrated using Maven and Gradle dependencies. While specific 2025 or 2026 release versions aren't explicitly listed in the search results, the project is actively maintained, with releases as recent as v1.12.25 mentioned.

You can typically find the Maven/Gradle dependency information on the project's GitHub releases page or through Maven repositories. One such repository lists `com.bihe0832.android:lib-sherpa-onnx` as available, indicating that AARs are published to Maven.

The web search for "sherpa-onnx android gradle "implementation" "com.k2fsa" build.gradle" has returned several relevant results. It appears that `sherpa-onnx` is an offline speech-to-text library that can be integrated into Android applications. The search results provide examples of how to include the `sherpa-onnx` dependency in an Android `build.gradle` file using `implementation 'com.k2fsa.sherpa-onnx:sherpa-onnx-android:1.x.x'` or similar.

Specifically:
*   Result 1 shows `implementation 'com.k2fsa.sherpa:sherpa-onnx:1.10.+'` for React Native.
*   Result 2 shows `implementation 'com.k2fsa.sherpa-onnx:sherpa-onnx-android:1.3.0'` as a dependency for SenseVoice mobile SDK integration.
*   Result 3 indicates `implementation "com.k2fsa.sherpa-onnx:sherpa-onnx-android:1.7.0"` in the `dependencies` block of `build.gradle` for an Android real-time speech recognition project.

*   Result 5 provides `implementation 'com.k2fsa.sherpa-onnx:sherpa-onnx-android:1.12.0'` in the `build.gradle` for Android deployment.

These results confirm that the `com.k2fsa` group ID is used for `sherpa-onnx` libraries in Android Gradle projects, and they are added using the `implementation` keyword. The version numbers vary across the snippets, indicating different releases of the library.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "sherpa-onnx android latest version 2025 maven central "sherpa-onnx-android""

The latest identified version for `sherpa-onnx-android` in Maven Central, as of the search, is `1.10.0`. This can be integrated into a Gradle project using the dependency `implementation 'com.github.k2-fsa:sherpa-onnx-android:1.10.0'`.

Sherpa-ONNX is described as a self-contained, offline-first toolkit that enables functionalities like Speech Recognition (ASR), Text-to-Speech (TTS), Voice Activity Detection (VAD), and more. It runs 100% locally with ONNX Runtime, offering benefits such as no network latency and GDPR/HIPAA friendliness. The project also maintains a monthly updated model zoo.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "site:github.com k2-fsa sherpa-onnx android SherpaOnnxOfflineRecognizer Java example"

The `k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx` project offers an Android Java example for `SherpaOnnxOfflineRecognizer`. While most Android examples within the project utilize Kotlin, a specific Java example is available. You can find this example at the following GitHub repository link: `https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/tree`.

The `sherpa-onnx` project provides speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and speaker recognition capabilities using next-gen Kaldi with ONNX Runtime, operating without an internet connection. It supports various platforms, including Android, and enables everything to be processed locally on the device. The project is self-contained, and everything can be compiled from source.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "sherpa-onnx OfflineRecognizer Java Android paraformer example "createStream" "decodeStream""

The web search for "sherpa-onnx OfflineRecognizer Java Android paraformer example \"createStream\" \"decodeStream\"" yielded a relevant CSDN blog post titled "sherpa-onnx API完全手册：开发者必备工具" (sherpa-onnx API Complete Manual: Developer Essential Tools).

This post provides a Java API example for `sherpa-onnx` on Android. It demonstrates the use of `OfflineRecognizerConfig`, `OfflineRecognizer`, and `OfflineStream`. Specifically, it shows how to:
*   Build an `OfflineRecognizerConfig` with model and token paths.
*   Create an `OfflineRecognizer` instance.
*   Create an `OfflineStream` using `recognizer.createStream()`.
*   Accept waveform data into the stream using `stream.acceptWaveform()`.
*   Decode the stream using `recognizer.decodeStream(stream)`.
*   Get the recognition result using `recognizer.GetResult(stream.get())`.

While the example shows `decodeStream` and `createStream`, it uses `GetResult` and `IsEndpoint` in the C++ section, implying similar functionalities for retrieving results after decoding in Java. The provided Java code snippet directly uses `recognizer.decodeStream(stream)` and implies subsequent result retrieval, aligning with the query's intent to find examples for these methods.

content.thinking:
I need to restructure the app to:

1. Remove sherpa-onnx from Chaquopy Python pip dependencies
2. Add sherpa-onnx AAR as a Gradle dependency (from JitPack)
3. Add JitPack to repositories
4. Implement sherpa-onnx offline recognition in Java
5. Keep Python for text comparison only

Let me also handle the model files - for the Java AAR approach, the model needs to be in Android assets and extracted to filesystem.

The Java API for sherpa-onnx:
- OfflineRecognizerConfig


- OfflineRecognizer (native JNI)
- OfflineStream
- createStream(), acceptWaveform(), decode()

Actually, I'm overcomplicating this. The cleanest approach is to handle ASR in Java using the sherpa-onnx AAR while keeping Chaquopy for text comparison, then pass the ASR result to Python. But I'm realizing the AAR from JitPack is quite large since it bundles the native libraries, and the model file itself is substantial too.

Looking at how the sherpa-onnx Android demo handles this, I see the model needs to be extracted from assets to the filesystem at runtime before initializing the recognizer. Since I've already bundled the model in assets, I need to extract it, initialize OfflineRecognizer with the path, decode the audio, and pass the resulting text to Python for comparison.

"""Android端Python引擎 - 被Java通过Chaquopy调用
   集成 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 离线语音识别"""
import os, re, json, base64, wave, struct
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
from urllib.parse import urlencode


# ===== 文档解析 =====
def parse_docx(filepath):
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    if ext == '.txt':
        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    import zipfile
    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    paragraphs = []
    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
        if line:
            paragraphs.append(line)
    return paragraphs


# ===== 文本规范化 =====
_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}

def _norm(text):
    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)

def _segment(text):
    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]

def _num_reading(text):
    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)

def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    if not a_c or not b_c:
        return False
    if a_c == b_c:
        return True
    return _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c)


# ===== 对比算法 =====
def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)

    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    diffs = []

    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
        if tag == 'equal':
            continue
        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])

        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
            continue
        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
            continue
        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
            continue

        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
        if tag == 'replace':
            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
        elif tag == 'delete':
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
        else:
            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))

    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)

    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
    return summary, diffs


# ===== Sherpa-ONNX 离线语音识别 =====
def _extract_assets_model(files_dir):
    """从 APK assets 提取模型文件到 filesDir（仅首次）"""
    model_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'models', 'paraformer')
    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if os.path.exists(model_path) and os.path.exists(tokens_path):
        return model_path, tokens_path

    # 用 Java 从 assets 提取
    os.makedirs(model_dir, exist_ok=True)

    try:
        from java import jclass
        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getContext()
        asset_mgr = context.getAssets()

        for fname in ['model.int8.onnx', 'tokens.txt']:
            asset_path = 'models/paraformer/' + fname
            out_path = os.path.join(model_dir, fname)
            if os.path.exists(out_path):
                continue

            inp = asset_mgr.open(asset_path)
            with open(out_path, 'wb') as f:
                buf = bytearray(8192)
                while True:
                    n = inp.read(buf)
                    if n == -1:
                        break
                    f.write(buf[:n])
            inp.close()
    except Exception as e:
        raise Exception('模型提取失败: %s' % str(e))

    return model_path, tokens_path


def transcribe_sherpa(filepath, files_dir):
    """使用 Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer 进行离线语音识别"""
    import sherpa_onnx

    model_path, tokens_path = _extract_assets_model(files_dir)

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    # 读取 WAV 文件
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1, '需要单声道音频'
        assert wf.getsampwidth() == 2, '需要16位音频'
        n_frames = wf.getnframes()
        raw = wf.readframes(n_frames)

    samples = struct.unpack('<%dh' % n_frames, raw)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
    text = stream.result.text.strip()

    return text


# ===== 百度语音识别（备用在线方案） =====
def _http_post_json(url, data, timeout=60):
    body = json.dumps(data).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body, headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def _http_post_form(url, params, timeout=10):
    body = urlencode(params).encode('utf-8')
    req = Request(url, data=body)
    resp = urlopen(req, timeout=timeout)
    return json.loads(resp.read().decode('utf-8'))

def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
    """百度语音识别（内置密钥）"""
    data = _http_post_form('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token', {
        'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
        'client_id': 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W',
        'client_secret': 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'
    })
    token = data.get('access_token', '')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    result = _http_post_json('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
    })
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception('百度识别失败: %s' % result.get('err_msg', '未知错误'))


# ===== Java调用入口 =====
def run_compare(audio_path, doc_path, files_dir):
    """主入口：优先使用 Sherpa-ONNX 离线识别，失败则回退到百度在线"""
    # 转录 - 优先 Sherpa-ONNX 离线
    try:
        audio_text = transcribe_sherpa(audio_path, files_dir)
    except Exception as e:
        # 回退到百度在线识别
        try:
            audio_text = transcribe_baidu(audio_path)
        except Exception as e2:
            raise Exception('语音识别失败 (离线: %s, 在线: %s)' % (str(e), str(e2)))

    # 解析文档
    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

    # 对比
    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)

    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}

content.text: 现在我看清了实际 API。这是 Kotlin data class，有默认构造函数 + setter 方法。`OfflineRecognizer` 需要 `AssetManager` 和 `OfflineRecognizerConfig`。让我更新 `MainActivity.java`：

所有 config 类都有无参构造函数和 setter。`OfflineRecognizer` 构造函数需要 `(AssetManager, OfflineRecognizerConfig)`。API 使用方式：创建 config 对象 → 设置属性 → 传入 OfflineRecognizer。

但注意：`OfflineRecognizer` 接受 `AssetManager`，意味着**模型路径是相对于 assets 的**，不需要提前提取！这简化了很多。

让我重写 `MainActivity.java`：

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="配音文字核对宝"
            android:textSize="24sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="#333"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:paddingBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
            android:background="#E8F5E9"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"

                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

toolUseResult.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="配音文字核对宝"
            android:textSize="24sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="#333"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:paddingBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
            android:background="#E8F5E9"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 模型配置区域 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="#E3F2FD"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔧 语音识别模型配置"
                android:textSize="15sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#1565C0"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 模型状态 -->
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvModelStatus"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="模型状态：检查中..."
                android:textSize="13sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 测试按钮 -->
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnTestModel"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:text="测试模型连通性"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

                android:id="@+id/tvResult"

                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

toolUseResult.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="配音文字核对宝"
            android:textSize="24sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="#333"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:paddingBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
            android:background="#E8F5E9"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 模型配置区域 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="#E3F2FD"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔧 语音识别引擎"
                android:textSize="15sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#1565C0"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- ASR 引擎选择 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="选择引擎："
                android:textSize="13sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingBottom="4dp" />

            <Spinner
                android:id="@+id/spinnerAsrEngine"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:background="#FFF"
                android:paddingStart="8dp"
                android:paddingEnd="8dp" />

            <!-- 模型状态 -->
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvModelStatus"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="模型状态：检查中..."
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingTop="8dp"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 测试按钮 -->
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnTestModel"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:text="测试连通性"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="配音文字核对宝"
            android:textSize="24sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="#333"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:paddingBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"

            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"

        <!-- 模型配置区域 -->
        <LinearLayout

            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="#E3F2FD"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔧 语音识别模型配置"

                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 模型状态 -->
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvModelStatus"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="模型状态：检查中..."
