                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 测试按钮 -->
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnTestModel"

                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:text="测试模型连通性"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"

            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

1→"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
     2→import os, sys, threading, json
     3→
     4→# 设置应用数据目录
     5→if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
     6→    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
     7→else:
     8→    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))
     9→
    10→sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)
    11→
    12→from kivy.app import App
    13→from kivy.lang import Builder
    14→from kivy.clock import Clock
    15→from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
    16→from kivy.utils import platform
    17→
    18→KV = '''
    19→#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp
    20→
    21→BoxLayout:
    22→    orientation: 'vertical'
    23→    canvas.before:
    24→        Color:
    25→            rgba: 0.98, 0.97, 0.94, 1
    26→        Rectangle:
    27→            pos: self.pos
    28→            size: self.size
    29→
    30→    # 顶部标题栏
    31→    BoxLayout:
    32→        size_hint_y: None
    33→        height: dp(56)
    34→        padding: dp(16), 0
    35→        canvas.before:
    36→            Color:
    37→                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
    38→            Rectangle:
    39→                pos: self.pos
    40→                size: self.size
    41→        Label:
    42→            text: '配音文字核对宝'
    43→            font_size: dp(20)
    44→            bold: True
    45→            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
    46→            halign: 'left'
    47→            valign: 'center'
    48→            text_size: self.size
    49→
    50→    # 主内容区
    51→    ScreenManager:
    52→        id: sm
    53→
    54→        Screen:
    55→            name: 'home'
    56→            ScrollView:
    57→                BoxLayout:
    58→                    orientation: 'vertical'
    59→                    size_hint_y: None
    60→                    height: self.minimum_height
    61→                    padding: dp(16)
    62→                    spacing: dp(12)
    63→
    64→                    # 微信导入提示
    65→                    BoxLayout:
    66→                        size_hint_y: None
    67→                        height: dp(80)
    68→                        padding: dp(12)
    69→                        canvas.before:
    70→                            Color:
    71→                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
    72→                            RoundedRectangle:
    73→                                pos: self.pos
    74→                                size: self.size
    75→                                radius: [dp(8)]
    76→                        Label:
    77→                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
    78→                            font_size: dp(14)
    79→                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
    80→                            text_size: self.size
    81→                            halign: 'center'
    82→                            valign: 'center'
    83→
    84→                    # 录音文件
    85→                    BoxLayout:
    86→                        size_hint_y: None
    87→                        height: dp(56)
    88→                        spacing: dp(8)
    89→                        Button:
    90→                            text: '选择录音'
    91→                            size_hint_x: 0.3
    92→                            font_size: dp(15)
    93→                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
    94→                            background_normal: ''
    95→                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
    96→                        Label:
    97→                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
    98→                            font_size: dp(13)
    99→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   100→                            text_size: self.size
   101→                            halign: 'left'
   102→                            valign: 'center'
   103→                            shorten: True
   104→
   105→                    # 文档文件
   106→                    BoxLayout:
   107→                        size_hint_y: None
   108→                        height: dp(56)
   109→                        spacing: dp(8)
   110→                        Button:
   111→                            text: '选择文档'
   112→                            size_hint_x: 0.3
   113→                            font_size: dp(15)
   114→                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
   115→                            background_normal: ''
   116→                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
   117→                        Label:
   118→                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
   119→                            font_size: dp(13)
   120→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   121→                            text_size: self.size
   122→                            halign: 'left'
   123→                            valign: 'center'
   124→                            shorten: True
   125→
   126→                    # 开始对比按钮
   127→                    Button:
   128→                        text: '开始对比'
   129→                        size_hint_y: None
   130→                        height: dp(56)
   131→                        font_size: dp(18)
   132→                        bold: True
   133→                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   134→                        background_normal: ''
   135→                        on_release: app.start_compare()
   136→
   137→                    # 进度
   138→                    Label:
   139→                        text: app.status_text
   140→                        size_hint_y: None
   141→                        height: dp(40)
   142→                        font_size: dp(14)
   143→                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
   144→
   145→                    ProgressBar:
   146→                        value: app.progress
   147→                        max: 100
   148→                        size_hint_y: None
   149→                        height: dp(8)
   150→
   151→                    # ASR设置
   152→                    BoxLayout:
   153→                        size_hint_y: None
   154→                        height: dp(48)
   155→                        spacing: dp(8)
   156→                        Label:
   157→                            text: 'ASR服务:'
   158→                            size_hint_x: 0.25
   159→                            font_size: dp(14)
   160→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   161→                            halign: 'right'
   162→                            text_size: self.size
   163→                            valign: 'center'
   164→                        Spinner:
   165→                            id: asr_spinner
   166→                            text: '离线识别(无需网络)'
   167→                            values: ['离线识别(无需网络)', 'FunASR(局域网)', '百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
   168→                            size_hint_x: 0.75
   169→                            font_size: dp(14)
   170→                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)
   171→
   172→                    # FunASR服务器地址
   173→                    BoxLayout:
   174→                        id: funasr_box
   175→                        size_hint_y: None
   176→                        height: dp(48)
   177→                        spacing: dp(8)
   178→                        Label:
   179→                            text: '电脑IP:'
   180→                            size_hint_x: 0.25
   181→                            font_size: dp(14)
   182→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   183→                            halign: 'right'
   184→                            text_size: self.size
   185→                            valign: 'center'
   186→                        TextInput:
   187→                            id: funasr_ip
   188→                            text: app.funasr_server
   189→                            hint_text: '如 192.168.1.100'
   190→                            size_hint_x: 0.75
   191→                            font_size: dp(14)
   192→                            multiline: False
   193→                            on_text_validate: app.save_funasr_ip(self.text)
   194→
   195→        Screen:
   196→            name: 'result'
   197→            BoxLayout:
   198→                orientation: 'vertical'
   199→                padding: dp(12)
   200→                spacing: dp(8)
   201→
   202→                # 摘要
   203→                Label:
   204→                    text: app.result_summary
   205→                    size_hint_y: None
   206→                    height: dp(80)
   207→                    font_size: dp(15)
   208→                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   209→                    text_size: self.width, None
   210→                    halign: 'center'
   211→
   212→                # 差异列表
   213→                ScrollView:
   214→                    RecycleView:
   215→                        id: diff_rv
   216→                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
   217→                        data: app.diff_items
   218→                        RecycleBoxLayout:
   219→                            orientation: 'vertical'
   220→                            default_size: None, dp(72)
   221→                            default_size_hint: 1, None
   222→                            size_hint_y: None
   223→                            height: self.minimum_height
   224→                            spacing: dp(4)
   225→
   226→                # 返回按钮
   227→                Button:
   228→                    text: '返回首页'
   229→                    size_hint_y: None
   230→                    height: dp(48)
   231→                    font_size: dp(16)
   232→                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
   233→                    background_normal: ''
   234→                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'
   235→
   236→
   237→<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
   238→    orientation: 'vertical'
   239→    padding: dp(8)
   240→    spacing: dp(2)
   241→    canvas.before:
   242→        Color:
   243→            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
   244→        RoundedRectangle:
   245→            pos: self.pos
   246→            size: self.size
   247→            radius: [dp(6)]
   248→    Label:
   249→        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
   250→        font_size: dp(12)
   251→        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   252→        halign: 'left'
   253→        text_size: self.size
   254→        size_hint_y: 0.3
   255→    Label:
   256→        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
   257→        font_size: dp(14)
   258→        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   259→        halign: 'left'
   260→        text_size: self.size
   261→        size_hint_y: 0.7
   262→'''
   263→
   264→ASR_MAP = {
   265→    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
   266→    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
   267→    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
   268→    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
   269→    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
   270→}
   271→
   272→
   273→class VoiceDocApp(App):
   274→    audio_path = StringProperty('')
   275→    audio_name = StringProperty('')
   276→    doc_path = StringProperty('')
   277→    doc_name = StringProperty('')
   278→    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
   279→    progress = NumericProperty(0)
   280→    result_summary = StringProperty('')
   281→    diff_items = ListProperty([])
   282→    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
   283→    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   284→
   285→    def build(self):
   286→        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
   287→        self._load_config()
   288→        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
   289→        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
   290→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
   291→        # 检查离线模型
   292→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model(), 2)
   293→        return root
   294→
   295→    def _config_path(self):
   296→        if platform == 'android':
   297→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   298→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
   299→        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')
   300→
   301→    def _load_config(self):
   302→        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
   303→        try:
   304→            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   305→                self._config.update(json.load(f))
   306→        except:
   307→            pass
   308→        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
   309→        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   310→
   311→    def _save_config(self):
   312→        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
   313→        try:
   314→            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
   315→            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
   316→            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   317→                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   318→        except:
   319→            pass
   320→
   321→    def _check_model(self):
   322→        """检查离线识别模型是否已下载"""
   323→        if self.asr_provider != 'sherpa_offline':
   324→            return
   325→        try:
   326→            from core.model_download import is_model_ready
   327→            if not is_model_ready():
   328→                self.status_text = '首次使用需下载离线模型(约80MB)，点击开始对比时自动下载'
   329→        except:
   330→            pass
   331→
   332→    def _check_intent(self):
   333→        """检查Android Share Intent"""
   334→        if platform != 'android':
   335→            return
   336→        try:
   337→            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
   338→            files = get_android_shared_files()
   339→            if not files:
   340→                return
   341→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   342→            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
   343→            for f in files:
   344→                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
   345→                ftype = classify_file(local)
   346→                if ftype == 'audio':
   347→                    self.audio_path = local
   348→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
   349→                elif ftype == 'doc':
   350→                    self.doc_path = local
   351→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
   352→            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
   353→                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
   354→        except Exception as e:
   355→            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
   356→
   357→    def pick_audio(self):
   358→        if platform == 'android':
   359→            self._android_pick('audio')
   360→        else:
   361→            self._desktop_pick('audio')
   362→
   363→    def pick_doc(self):
   364→        if platform == 'android':
   365→            self._android_pick('doc')
   366→        else:
   367→            self._desktop_pick('doc')
   368→
   369→    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
   370→        try:
   371→            from jnius import autoclass
   372→            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
   373→            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
   374→            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
   375→            if file_type == 'audio':
   376→                intent.setType('audio/*')
   377→            else:
   378→                intent.setType('application/*')
   379→            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
   380→            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
   381→        except Exception as e:
   382→            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
   383→
   384→    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
   385→        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
   386→        try:
   387→            from plyer import filechooser
   388→            if file_type == 'audio':
   389→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
   390→            else:
   391→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
   392→            if paths:
   393→                p = paths[0]
   394→                if file_type == 'audio':
   395→                    self.audio_path = p
   396→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
   397→                else:
   398→                    self.doc_path = p
   399→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
   400→        except:
   401→            pass
   402→
   403→    def on_asr_change(self, text):
   404→        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
   405→        self._save_config()
   406→
   407→    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
   408→        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
   409→        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
   410→            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
   411→        self.funasr_server = ip_text
   412→        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
   413→        self._save_config()
   414→        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'
   415→
   416→    def start_compare(self):
   417→        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
   418→            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
   419→            return
   420→        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
   421→        self.progress = 0
   422→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()
   423→
   424→    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
   425→        def _do(dt):
   426→            for k, v in kwargs.items():
   427→                setattr(self, k, v)
   428→        Clock.schedule_once(_do)
   429→
   430→    def _do_compare(self):
   431→        try:
   432→            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
   433→            from core.compare import compare_texts
   434→            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt
   435→
   436→            # 步骤1: 转录
   437→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
   438→            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
   439→            # FunASR需要server_url
   440→            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
   441→                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
   442→            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
   443→                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
   444→                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
   445→            )
   446→            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')
   447→
   448→            # 步骤2: 解析文档
   449→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
   450→            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
   451→            if ext == '.txt':
   452→                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
   453→            else:
   454→                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
   455→            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   456→
   457→            # 步骤3: 对比
   458→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
   459→            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
   460→            self._update_ui(progress=95)
   461→
   462→            # 构建结果
   463→            diffs = result['diffs']
   464→            items = []
   465→            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
   466→            for d in diffs:
   467→                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
   468→                ts = ''
   469→                if 'time_start' in d:
   470→                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
   471→                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
   472→                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
   473→                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
   474→                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
   475→                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
   476→                else:
   477→                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
   478→                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})
   479→
   480→            self._update_ui(
   481→                progress=100,
   482→                status_text='对比完成',
   483→                result_summary=result['summary'],
   484→                diff_items=items,
   485→            )
   486→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))
   487→
   488→        except Exception as e:
   489→            import traceback
   490→            traceback.print_exc()
   491→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)
   492→
   493→
   494→if __name__ == '__main__':
   495→    VoiceDocApp().run()
   496→

1→"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
     2→import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
     3→import requests
     4→from typing import Optional, Callable
     5→
     6→
     7→def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
     8→    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
     9→    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    10→    """
    11→    if output_path is None:
    12→        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'
    13→
    14→    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    15→    try:
    16→        subprocess.run([
    17→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
    18→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
    19→            output_path
    20→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
    21→        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
    22→            return output_path
    23→    except:
    24→        pass
    25→
    26→    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    27→    try:
    28→        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
    29→                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    30→        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
    31→        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
    32→            subprocess.run([
    33→                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
    34→                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
    35→            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    36→            os.remove(pcm_path)
    37→            if os.path.exists(output_path):
    38→                return output_path
    39→    except:
    40→        pass
    41→
    42→    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理
    43→
    44→
    45→def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    46→    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    47→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    48→
    49→    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    50→    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
    51→        if progress_cb:
    52→            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
    53→        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
    54→        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)
    55→
    56→    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    57→    if progress_cb:
    58→        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    59→    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    60→    try:
    61→        subprocess.run([
    62→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
    63→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
    64→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
    65→        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
    66→            return out
    67→    except:
    68→        pass
    69→    return filepath
    70→
    71→
    72→def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    73→    """百度语音识别API"""
    74→    if progress_cb:
    75→        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')
    76→
    77→    # 获取token
    78→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
    79→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    80→    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    81→    if not token:
    82→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
    83→
    84→    # 读取音频
    85→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
    86→        audio_data = f.read()
    87→
    88→    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
    89→        # 长音频分段处理
    90→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)
    91→
    92→    if progress_cb:
    93→        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')
    94→
    95→    payload = {
    96→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
    97→        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
    98→        'token': token,
    99→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   100→        'len': len(audio_data),
   101→        'dev_pid': 1537
   102→    }
   103→    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   104→    result = resp.json()
   105→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   106→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   107→    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')
   108→
   109→
   110→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
   111→    """长音频分段百度识别"""
   112→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   113→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   114→    subprocess.run([
   115→        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
   116→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
   117→    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
   118→
   119→    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   120→    if not chunks:
   121→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   122→
   123→    results = []
   124→    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
   125→        if progress_cb:
   126→            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
   127→        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
   128→            audio_data = f.read()
   129→        payload = {
   130→            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   131→            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
   132→            'token': token,
   133→            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   134→            'len': len(audio_data),
   135→            'dev_pid': 1537
   136→        }
   137→        try:
   138→            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   139→            r = resp.json()
   140→            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   141→                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
   142→        except:
   143→            pass
   144→        os.remove(chunk)
   145→    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   146→    return ''.join(results)
   147→
   148→
   149→def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
   150→    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
   151→    if progress_cb:
   152→        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
   153→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   154→        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   155→            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   156→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   157→            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   158→                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   159→            timeout=180)
   160→    data = resp.json()
   161→    if 'text' not in data:
   162→        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')
   163→
   164→    text = data['text']
   165→    words = []
   166→    if 'words' in data:
   167→        for w in data['words']:
   168→            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
   169→    return text, words or None
   170→
   171→
   172→def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
   173→    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
   174→    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
   175→    """
   176→    try:
   177→        import sherpa_onnx
   178→    except ImportError:
   179→        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
   180→                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')
   181→
   182→    if model_dir is None:
   183→        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
   184→        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
   185→        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
   186→            model_dir = builtin
   187→        else:
   188→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   189→            if kv_platform == 'android':
   190→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
   191→                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
   192→            else:
   193→                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')
   194→
   195→    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
   196→    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')
   197→
   198→    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
   199→        if progress_cb:
   200→            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
   201→        from core.model_download import download_model
   202→        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
   203→
   204→    if progress_cb:
   205→        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')
   206→
   207→    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
   208→        paraformer=model_path,
   209→        tokens=tokens_path,
   210→        num_threads=4,
   211→        sample_rate=16000,
   212→        decoding_method='greedy_search',
   213→    )
   214→
   215→    if progress_cb:
   216→        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')
   217→
   218→    # 读取音频
   219→    import wave
   220→    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
   221→        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
   222→        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())
   223→
   224→    import struct
   225→    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
   226→    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]
   227→
   228→    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
   229→    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
   230→    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
   231→
   232→    text = stream.result.text.strip()
   233→    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
   234→    words = None
   235→    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
   236→        words = []
   237→        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
   238→        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
   239→        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
   240→            if i < len(ts_list):
   241→                start = ts_list[i]
   242→                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
   243→                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})
   244→
   245→    return text, words
   246→
   247→
   248→def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
   249→    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
   250→    import tarfile, io
   251→    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
   252→    # 国内镜像
   253→    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
   254→
   255→    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
   256→    if progress_cb:
   257→        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')
   258→
   259→    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
   260→        try:
   261→            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
   262→            resp.raise_for_status()
   263→            data = io.BytesIO()
   264→            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
   265→            downloaded = 0
   266→            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
   267→                data.write(chunk)
   268→                downloaded += len(chunk)
   269→                if progress_cb and total:
   270→                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
   271→                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
   272→            data.seek(0)
   273→            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
   274→                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
   275→            if progress_cb:
   276→                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
   277→            return True
   278→        except:
   279→            continue
   280→    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')
   281→
   282→
   283→def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
   284→    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
   285→    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
   286→    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
   287→    """
   288→    if progress_cb:
   289→        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')
   290→
   291→    # 先检查服务是否可用
   292→    try:
   293→        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
   294→        if r.status_code != 200:
   295→            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
   296→    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
   297→        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')
   298→
   299→    if progress_cb:
   300→        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')
   301→
   302→    # 上传音频文件进行转录
   303→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   304→        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
   305→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
   306→            timeout=600)
   307→
   308→    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
   309→    if resp.status_code == 404:
   310→        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
   311→            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)
   312→
   313→    data = resp.json()
   314→    if not data.get('success'):
   315→        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))
   316→
   317→    text = data.get('text', '')
   318→    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
   319→    words = None
   320→
   321→    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
   322→        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
   323→        words = []
   324→        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
   325→            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
   326→                ts = timestamps[i]
   327→                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})
   328→
   329→    return text, words
   330→
   331→
   332→def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
   333→    """统一转录入口"""
   334→    keys = keys or {}
   335→    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)
   336→
   337→    if provider == 'sherpa_offline':
   338→        model_dir = keys.get('model_dir')
   339→        return transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir, progress_cb)
   340→
   341→    if provider == 'funasr':
   342→        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   343→        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)
   344→
   345→    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
   346→        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
   347→        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
   348→        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
   349→        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
   350→        return text, None
   351→
   352→    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
   353→        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)
   354→
   355→    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
   356→        if progress_cb:
   357→            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
   358→        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   359→            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   360→                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
   361→                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   362→                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   363→                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   364→                timeout=120)
   365→        data = resp.json()
   366→        text = data.get('text', '')
   367→        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
   368→                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
   369→        return text, words
   370→
   371→    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')
   372→

content.content:
1→"""核心对比算法 - 移植自桌面版 compare.py，适配Android"""
     2→import re
     3→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→
     6→# 填充词过滤
     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个'}
     9→
    10→CN_NUMBERS_READING = {
    11→    '0': '零', '1': '一', '2': '二', '3': '三', '4': '四',
    12→    '5': '五', '6': '六', '7': '七', '8': '八', '9': '九'
    13→}
    14→
    15→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]')
    16→
    17→
    18→def _normalize(text):
    19→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    20→
    21→
    22→def _is_punct(ch):
    23→    return bool(_RE_PUNCT.match(ch))
    24→
    25→
    26→def _segment(text):
    27→    """分词：优先用jieba，不可用时按字切分"""
    28→    try:
    29→        import jieba
    30→        return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # Android上jieba可能不可用，按字切分
    33→        return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    34→
    35→
    36→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    37→    """拼音比较：优先用pypinyin，不可用时直接字符比较"""
    38→    if not a or not b:
    39→        return False
    40→    a_clean = _normalize(a)
    41→    b_clean = _normalize(b)
    42→    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
    43→        return False
    44→    if a_clean == b_clean:
    45→        return True
    46→    try:
    47→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    48→        pa = pinyin(a_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    49→        pb = pinyin(b_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    50→        return pa == pb
    51→    except ImportError:
    52→        return False
    53→
    54→
    55→def _arabic_to_chinese(num_str, is_year=False):
    56→    if not num_str or not num_str.isdigit():
    57→        return num_str
    58→    if is_year:
    59→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    60→    try:
    61→        num = int(num_str)
    62→        if num < 10:
    63→            return CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str]
    64→        elif num < 20:
    65→            return '十' + (CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str[1]] if num_str[1] != '0' else '')
    66→        elif num < 100:
    67→            t, o = num // 10, num % 10
    68→            r = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(t)] + '十'
    69→            if o > 0:
    70→                r += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(o)]
    71→            return r
    72→        else:
    73→            return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    74→    except:
    75→        return num_str
    76→
    77→
    78→def _normalize_number_reading(text):
    79→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in m.group(1)) + '年', text)
    80→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
    81→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
    82→    return re.sub(r'\s+', '', result)
    83→
    84→
    85→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, word_pos, doc_words):
    86→    char_offset = sum(len(w) for w in doc_words[:word_pos])
    87→    running = 0
    88→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    89→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    90→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    91→            return idx
    92→        running += plen
    93→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
    94→
    95→
    96→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=None, confidence_threshold=0.0):
    97→    """核心对比算法：jieba分词 + SequenceMatcher + 拼音同音字识别"""
    98→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    99→
   100→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
   101→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
   102→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
   103→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
   104→
   105→    # 时间戳映射
   106→    ts_map = {}
   107→    if word_timestamps:
   108→        offset = 0
   109→        for wt in word_timestamps:
   110→            w_norm = _normalize(wt['word'])
   111→            for i in range(len(w_norm)):
   112→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
   113→            offset += len(w_norm)
   114→
   115→    # 序列比对
   116→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   117→    raw_diffs = []
   118→
   119→    audio_char_offsets = []
   120→    off = 0
   121→    for w in audio_words:
   122→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
   123→        off += len(w)
   124→
   125→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   126→        if tag == 'equal':
   127→            continue
   128→
   129→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   130→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   131→
   132→        # 过滤填充词
   133→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   134→            continue
   135→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   136→            continue
   137→        if tag == 'replace':
   138→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   139→                continue
   140→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   141→                continue
   142→            # 数字规范化后再比较拼音
   143→            if _same_pinyin(_normalize_number_reading(doc_frag), _normalize_number_reading(audio_frag)):
   144→                continue
   145→
   146→        # 跳过纯标点差异
   147→        if all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in doc_frag) and all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in audio_frag):
   148→            continue
   149→
   150→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, i1, doc_words)
   151→
   152→        # 获取时间戳
   153→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   154→        confidence = 1.0
   155→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   156→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   157→            if char_off in ts_map:
   158→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   159→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   160→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   161→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   162→                if end_off in ts_map:
   163→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   164→
   165→        diff_entry = {
   166→            'docText': doc_frag,
   167→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   168→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   169→            'position': pos,
   170→            'confidence': confidence,
   171→        }
   172→        if ts_start is not None:
   173→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   174→        if ts_end is not None:
   175→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   176→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   177→
   178→    # 统计
   179→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   180→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   181→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   182→
   183→    # 字准确率
   184→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
   185→    diff_chars = sum(max(len(d['docText']), len(d['audioText'])) for d in raw_diffs)
   186→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - diff_chars / total) * 100)
   187→
   188→    summary = f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n字准确率 {accuracy:.1f}%'
   189→
   190→    return {
   191→        'diffs': raw_diffs,
   192→        'summary': summary,
   193→        'accuracy': accuracy,
   194→        'n_mismatch': n_mismatch,
   195→        'n_missing': n_missing,
   196→        'n_extra': n_extra,
   197→    }
   198→

content.content:
1→# 配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版
     2→
     3→## 功能
     4→- 从微信聊天记录直接导入录音和文档（通过分享功能）
     5→- 语音转文字（百度ASR内置/Groq Whisper/OpenAI Whisper）
     6→- 智能文本对比（jieba分词 + 拼音同音字识别 + 数字规范化）
     7→- 差异标注（误读/漏读/多读 + 时间戳定位）
     8→
     9→## 微信导入方式
    10→1. 打开微信聊天窗口
    11→2. 长按录音/文档文件
    12→3. 点击"分享" → 选择"配音文字核对宝"
    13→4. 文件自动导入APP
    14→
    15→## 项目结构
    16→```
    17→app/
    18→  main.py              # Kivy主程序 + UI
    19→  core/
    20→    compare.py         # 核心对比算法
    21→    transcribe.py      # 语音转录（多ASR引擎）
    22→    docx_util.py       # Word文档解析
    23→    wechat_import.py   # 微信Share Intent文件导入
    24→buildozer.spec         # Android构建配置
    25→intent_filters.xml     # Share Intent声明
    26→build_apk.py           # 构建辅助脚本
    27→```
    28→
    29→## 构建APK
    30→
    31→### 方式一：本地构建（需要Linux/WSL）
    32→```bash
    33→pip install buildozer cython kivy
    34→buildozer android debug
    35→```
    36→
    37→### 方式二：GitHub Actions
    38→推送到GitHub后自动构建，在Actions页面下载APK。
    39→
    40→## 核心算法
    41→移植自桌面版 VoiceDocCompare，包含：
    42→- **SequenceMatcher序列比对** - 基于jieba分词的词级差异检测
    43→- **拼音同音字识别** - pypinyin比较，避免同音字误报
    44→- **数字读音规范化** - 阿拉伯数字↔中文数字统一比较
    45→- **填充词过滤** - 自动忽略"嗯""啊"等口语填充词
    46→- **SILK音频解码** - 支持微信.amr/.silk语音格式
    47→

content.content:
1→"""微信文件导入模块 - 通过Android Share Intent接收文件"""
     2→import os
     3→import shutil
     4→
     5→
     6→# 微信分享的文件类型
     7→AUDIO_EXTS = {'.wav', '.mp3', '.m4a', '.flac', '.ogg', '.wma', '.aac', '.amr', '.silk', '.slk', '.opus'}
     8→DOC_EXTS = {'.docx', '.doc', '.txt'}
     9→
    10→
    11→def classify_file(filepath):
    12→    """识别文件类型：audio / doc / unknown"""
    13→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    14→    if ext in AUDIO_EXTS:
    15→        return 'audio'
    16→    elif ext in DOC_EXTS:
    17→        return 'doc'
    18→    return 'unknown'
    19→
    20→
    21→def import_shared_file(uri_or_path, app_data_dir):
    22→    """将分享的文件复制到应用数据目录"""
    23→    os.makedirs(app_data_dir, exist_ok=True)
    24→    filename = os.path.basename(uri_or_path)
    25→    dest = os.path.join(app_data_dir, filename)
    26→
    27→    # 避免重名
    28→    if os.path.exists(dest):
    29→        name, ext = os.path.splitext(filename)
    30→        i = 1
    31→        while os.path.exists(dest):
    32→            dest = os.path.join(app_data_dir, f'{name}_{i}{ext}')
    33→            i += 1
    34→
    35→    shutil.copy2(uri_or_path, dest)
    36→    return dest
    37→
    38→
    39→def get_android_shared_files():
    40→    """获取Android Intent传入的文件（需要在Kivy Activity中调用）"""
    41→    try:
    42→        from jnius import autoclass
    43→        PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
    44→        Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
    45→        activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
    46→        intent = activity.getIntent()
    47→
    48→        action = intent.getAction()
    49→        files = []
    50→
    51→        if action == Intent.ACTION_SEND:
    52→            uri = intent.getParcelableExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM)
    53→            if uri:
    54→                path = _uri_to_path(activity, uri)
    55→                if path:
    56→                    files.append(path)
    57→
    58→        elif action == Intent.ACTION_SEND_MULTIPLE:
    59→            uris = intent.getParcelableArrayListExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM)
    60→            if uris:
    61→                for i in range(uris.size()):
    62→                    path = _uri_to_path(activity, uris.get(i))
    63→                    if path:
    64→                        files.append(path)
    65→
    66→        return files
    67→    except Exception:
    68→        return []
    69→
    70→
    71→def _uri_to_path(activity, uri):
    72→    """将Android content:// URI转为文件路径"""
    73→    try:
    74→        from jnius import autoclass
    75→        ContentResolver = activity.getContentResolver()
    76→        InputStream = ContentResolver.openInputStream(uri)
    77→
    78→        # 获取文件名
    79→        Cursor = ContentResolver.query(uri, None, None, None, None)
    80→        name_index = Cursor.getColumnIndex("_display_name")
    81→        Cursor.moveToFirst()
    82→        filename = Cursor.getString(name_index)
    83→        Cursor.close()
    84→
    85→        # 复制到缓存目录
    86→        cache_dir = activity.getCacheDir().getAbsolutePath()
    87→        dest = os.path.join(cache_dir, filename)
    88→
    89→        FileOutputStream = autoclass('java.io.FileOutputStream')
    90→        fos = FileOutputStream(dest)
    91→        buf = bytearray(8192)
    92→
    93→        from jnius import cast
    94→        while True:
    95→            n = InputStream.read(buf)
    96→            if n == -1:
    97→                break
    98→            fos.write(buf, 0, n)
    99→
   100→        fos.close()
   101→        InputStream.close()
   102→        return dest
   103→    except Exception:
   104→        return None
   105→

content.content:
1→"""Sherpa-ONNX 离线模型下载脚本
     2→
     3→在手机首次使用前，可以先在电脑上下载模型，然后传到手机。
     4→也可以在手机上直接运行此脚本下载。
     5→
     6→模型：Paraformer中英文离线识别，约80MB
     7→"""
     8→import os, sys, zipfile, requests
     9→
    10→# 使用sherpa-onnx官方提供的Paraformer中文模型
    11→MODEL_URL = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'
    12→# 国内加速镜像
    13→MIRROR_URLS = [
    14→    'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2',
    15→    'https://ghproxy.com/https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2',
    16→    MODEL_URL,
    17→]
    18→
    19→
    20→def get_model_dir():
    21→    """获取模型存储目录"""
    22→    try:
    23→        from kivy.utils import platform
    24→        if platform == 'android':
    25→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
    26→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
    27→    except:
    28→        pass
    29→    return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')
    30→
    31→
    32→def is_model_ready(model_dir=None):
    33→    """检查模型是否已下载"""
    34→    if model_dir is None:
    35→        model_dir = get_model_dir()
    36→    return os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx'))
    37→
    38→
    39→def download_model(dest_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    40→    """下载Paraformer离线模型"""
    41→    import tarfile, io
    42→
    43→    if dest_dir is None:
    44→        dest_dir = get_model_dir()
    45→    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    46→
    47→    for url in MIRROR_URLS:
    48→        try:
    49→            if progress_cb:
    50→                progress_cb(f'正在下载模型...')
    51→            print(f'尝试下载: {url}')
    52→
    53→            resp = requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=30)
    54→            resp.raise_for_status()
    55→
    56→            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
    57→            data = io.BytesIO()
    58→            downloaded = 0
    59→
    60→            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
    61→                data.write(chunk)
    62→                downloaded += len(chunk)
    63→                if total:
    64→                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
    65→                    mb = downloaded // 1024 // 1024
    66→                    msg = f'下载模型: {pct}% ({mb}MB)'
    67→                    if progress_cb:
    68→                        progress_cb(msg)
    69→                    if downloaded % (1024 * 1024) < 8192:
    70→                        print(msg)
    71→
    72→            data.seek(0)
    73→            if progress_cb:
    74→                progress_cb('正在解压模型...')
    75→            print('正在解压...')
    76→
    77→            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
    78→                # 解压到dest_dir，去掉顶层目录
    79→                for member in tar.getmembers():
    80→                    # 去掉第一层目录名
    81→                    parts = member.name.split('/', 1)
    82→                    if len(parts) > 1:
    83→                        member.name = parts[1]
    84→                        tar.extract(member, dest_dir)
    85→
    86→            print(f'模型已下载到: {dest_dir}')
    87→            if progress_cb:
    88→                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
    89→            return True
    90→
    91→        except Exception as e:
    92→            print(f'下载失败({url}): {e}')
    93→            continue
    94→
    95→    raise Exception('所有下载源均失败，请手动下载模型')
    96→
    97→
    98→if __name__ == '__main__':
    99→    dest = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else get_model_dir()
   100→    if is_model_ready(dest):
   101→        print(f'模型已存在: {dest}')
   102→    else:
   103→        download_model(dest, progress_cb=lambda m: print(m))
   104→

1→"""文档解析模块 - Android版"""
     2→import os
     3→import re
     4→
     5→
     6→def parse_docx(filepath):
     7→    """解析Word文档，返回段落列表"""
     8→    try:
     9→        from docx import Document
    10→        doc = Document(filepath)
    11→        return [p.text.strip() for p in doc.paragraphs if p.text.strip()]
    12→    except ImportError:
    13→        # python-docx不可用时，尝试用zipfile解析docx（docx本质是zip）
    14→        return _parse_docx_raw(filepath)
    15→
    16→
    17→def _parse_docx_raw(filepath):
    18→    """不依赖python-docx的docx解析（备用方案）"""
    19→    import zipfile
    20→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    21→
    22→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    23→    paragraphs = []
    24→
    25→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    26→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    27→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    28→
    29→    for p_elem in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    30→        texts = []
    31→        for t_elem in p_elem.iter(f'{ns}t'):
    32→            if t_elem.text:
    33→                texts.append(t_elem.text)
    34→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    35→        if line:
    36→            paragraphs.append(line)
    37→
    38→    return paragraphs
    39→
    40→
    41→def parse_txt(filepath):
    42→    """解析纯文本文件"""
    43→    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    44→        return [line.strip() for line in f if line.strip()]
    45→

content.content:
1→"""Android端Python引擎 - 被Java通过Chaquopy调用
     2→   仅负责文本对比逻辑，ASR由Java端sherpa-onnx完成"""
     3→import os, re
     4→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     5→
     6→
     7→# ===== 文档解析 =====
     8→def parse_docx(filepath):
     9→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    10→    if ext == '.txt':
    11→        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    12→            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    13→    import zipfile
    14→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    15→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    16→    paragraphs = []
    17→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    18→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    19→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    20→    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    21→        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
    22→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    23→        if line:
    24→            paragraphs.append(line)
    25→    return paragraphs
    26→
    27→
    28→# ===== 文本规范化 =====
    29→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
    30→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
    31→CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}
    32→
    33→def _norm(text):
    34→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    35→
    36→def _segment(text):
    37→    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    38→
    39→def _num_reading(text):
    40→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    41→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    42→    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    43→
    44→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    45→    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    46→    if not a_c or not b_c:
    47→        return False
    48→    if a_c == b_c:
    49→        return True
    50→    return _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c)
    51→
    52→
    53→# ===== 对比算法 =====
    54→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    55→    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    56→    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    57→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    58→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    59→
    60→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    61→    diffs = []
    62→
    63→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    64→        if tag == 'equal':
    65→            continue
    66→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    67→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    68→
    69→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    70→            continue
    71→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    72→            continue
    73→        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
    74→            continue
    75→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
    76→            continue
    77→
    78→        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
    79→        if tag == 'replace':
    80→            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
    81→        elif tag == 'delete':
    82→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
    83→        else:
    84→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))
    85→
    86→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    87→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    88→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    89→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    90→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)
    91→
    92→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
    93→    return summary, diffs
    94→
    95→
    96→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
    97→def run_compare(audio_text, doc_path):
    98→    """主入口：接收Java端已完成的ASR文本，进行文本对比
    99→
   100→    Args:
   101→        audio_text: Java端sherpa-onnx识别的文本
   102→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
   103→    """
   104→    # 解析文档
   105→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
   106→    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   107→
   108→    # 对比
   109→    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
   110→
   111→    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
   112→

content.content:
1→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
     2→<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
     3→
     4→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
     5→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
     6→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
     7→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />
     8→
     9→    <application
    10→        android:allowBackup="true"
    11→        android:label="配音文字核对宝"
    12→        android:supportsRtl="true"
    13→        android:theme="@style/Theme.VoiceDocCompare">
    14→
    15→        <activity
    16→            android:name=".MainActivity"
    17→            android:exported="true">
    18→            <intent-filter>
    19→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
    20→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
    21→            </intent-filter>
    22→
    23→            <!-- 接收微信分享的音频文件 -->
    24→            <intent-filter>
    25→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    26→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    27→                <data android:mimeType="audio/*" />
    28→            </intent-filter>
    29→
    30→            <!-- 接收微信分享的文档文件 -->
    31→            <intent-filter>
    32→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    33→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    34→                <data android:mimeType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" />
    35→            </intent-filter>
    36→            <intent-filter>
    37→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    38→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    39→                <data android:mimeType="application/msword" />
    40→            </intent-filter>
    41→            <intent-filter>
    42→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    43→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    44→                <data android:mimeType="text/plain" />
    45→            </intent-filter>
    46→
    47→            <!-- 接收多文件分享 -->
    48→            <intent-filter>
    49→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND_MULTIPLE" />
    50→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    51→                <data android:mimeType="*/*" />
    52→            </intent-filter>
    53→        </activity>
    54→    </application>
    55→</manifest>
    56→

     3→    android:layout_width="match_parent"
     4→    android:layout_height="match_parent"
     5→    android:background="#FFF8F0">
     6→
     7→    <LinearLayout
     8→        android:layout_width="match_parent"
     9→        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    10→        android:orientation="vertical"
    11→        android:padding="16dp">
    12→
    13→        <!-- 标题 -->
    14→        <TextView
    15→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
    16→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    17→            android:text="配音文字核对宝"
    18→            android:textSize="24sp"
    19→            android:textStyle="bold"
    20→            android:textColor="#333"
    21→            android:gravity="center"
    22→            android:paddingBottom="16dp" />
    23→
    24→        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
    25→        <TextView
    26→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
    27→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    28→            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
    29→            android:textSize="13sp"
    30→            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
    31→            android:background="#E8F5E9"

    33→            android:gravity="center"
    34→            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
    35→

    38→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
    39→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"

    41→            android:background="#E3F2FD"
    42→            android:padding="12dp"
    43→            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
    44→
    45→            <TextView
    46→                android:layout_width="match_parent"
    47→                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
    48→                android:text="🔧 语音识别引擎"
    49→                android:textSize="15sp"
    50→                android:textStyle="bold"
    51→                android:textColor="#1565C0"
    52→                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
    53→
    54→            <!-- ASR 引擎选择 -->

    56→                android:layout_width="match_parent"

    60→                android:textColor="#555"
    61→                android:paddingBottom="4dp" />
    62→
    63→            <Spinner

    65→                android:layout_width="match_parent"

    67→                android:background="#FFF"

    69→                android:paddingEnd="8dp" />
    70→

    75→                android:layout_height="wrap_content"

    77→                android:textSize="12sp"
    78→                android:textColor="#555"
    79→                android:paddingTop="8dp"

    81→

    89→                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

    91→        </LinearLayout>

    99→            <Button

   105→            <TextView

   112→                android:paddingStart="12dp"
   113→                android:textColor="#666"
   114→                android:singleLine="true"
   115→                android:ellipsize="middle" />
   116→        </LinearLayout>
   117→
   118→        <!-- 选择文档 -->

   126→                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
   127→                android:layout_height="48dp"

   129→                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />

   137→                android:paddingStart="12dp"
   138→                android:textColor="#666"
   139→                android:singleLine="true"
   140→                android:ellipsize="middle" />
   141→        </LinearLayout>
   142→
   143→        <!-- 开始对比 -->
   144→        <Button
   145→            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"

   150→            android:textStyle="bold"
   151→            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />
   152→
   153→        <!-- 进度条 -->

   155→            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
   156→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
   157→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
   158→            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
   159→            android:visibility="gone"
   160→            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
   161→            android:indeterminate="true" />
   162→
   163→        <!-- 状态 -->
   164→        <TextView
   165→            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
   166→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
   167→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
   168→            android:text="就绪"
   169→            android:textColor="#888"
   170→            android:gravity="center"
   171→            android:padding="8dp" />
   172→
   173→        <!-- 结果 -->
   174→        <ScrollView
   175→            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
   176→            android:layout_width="match_parent"
   177→            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
   178→            android:visibility="gone"
   179→            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
   180→            android:background="#FFF"
   181→            android:padding="12dp">
   182→            <TextView

   184→                android:layout_width="match_parent"
   185→                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
   186→                android:textSize="14sp"
   187→                android:textColor="#333"
   188→                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
   189→        </ScrollView>
   190→
   191→    </LinearLayout>
   192→</ScrollView>

content.content:
1→"""FunASR服务端补丁 - 添加文件上传接口，供手机远程调用
     2→
     3→使用方法：在电脑上运行此脚本，手机通过WiFi连接即可调用
     4→    python funasr_server_patch.py
     5→
     6→或者将 /transcribe_file 路由添加到已有的 FunASR server.py 中
     7→"""
     8→import os, sys, tempfile
     9→from flask import Flask, request, jsonify
    10→
    11→app = Flask(__name__)
    12→
    13→# 复用已有的FunASR服务
    14→FUNASR_URL = 'http://localhost:8765'
    15→
    16→
    17→@app.route('/health')
    18→def health():
    19→    return jsonify({'status': 'ok'})
    20→
    21→
    22→@app.route('/transcribe_file', methods=['POST'])
    23→def transcribe_file():
    24→    """接收手机上传的音频文件并转录"""
    25→    if 'file' not in request.files:
    26→        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': '未收到文件'}), 400
    27→
    28→    f = request.files['file']
    29→    # 保存到临时文件
    30→    tmp = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='_' + f.filename, delete=False)
    31→    f.save(tmp.name)
    32→    tmp.close()
    33→
    34→    try:
    35→        import requests as req
    36→        # 转发给本地FunASR服务
    37→        resp = req.post(f'{FUNASR_URL}/transcribe',
    38→                        json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(tmp.name)}, timeout=600)
    39→        return jsonify(resp.json())
    40→    except Exception as e:
    41→        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}), 500
    42→    finally:
    43→        try:
    44→            os.remove(tmp.name)
    45→        except:
    46→            pass
    47→
    48→
    49→@app.route('/transcribe', methods=['POST'])
    50→def transcribe_proxy():
    51→    """代理转发到FunASR"""
    52→    import requests as req
    53→    data = request.get_json()
    54→    resp = req.post(f'{FUNASR_URL}/transcribe', json=data, timeout=600)
    55→    return jsonify(resp.json())
    56→
    57→
    58→if __name__ == '__main__':
    59→    import socket
    60→    hostname = socket.gethostname()
    61→    local_ip = socket.gethostbyname(hostname)
    62→    print(f'FunASR文件上传代理已启动')
    63→    print(f'手机请连接: http://{local_ip}:8766')
    64→    print(f'确保电脑FunASR服务已在 {FUNASR_URL} 运行')
    65→    app.run(host='0.0.0.0', port=8766, debug=False)
    66→

content.content:
1→"""构建APK的说明和辅助脚本
     2→
     3→构建环境要求（Linux/WSL）：
     4→    sudo apt install python3-pip openjdk-17-jdk autoconf automake libtool
     5→    pip install buildozer cython kivy
     6→
     7→构建步骤：
     8→    1. 在Linux/WSL中进入项目目录
     9→    2. 运行: buildozer android debug
    10→    3. APK输出到: bin/voicedoccompare-1.0.0-arm64-v8a-debug.apk
    11→
    12→也可以用GitHub Actions自动构建（见 .github/workflows/build.yml）
    13→"""
    14→import os
    15→import sys
    16→import subprocess
    17→
    18→
    19→def check_env():
    20→    """检查构建环境"""
    21→    checks = {
    22→        'Python': sys.version,
    23→        'buildozer': None,
    24→        'java': None,
    25→    }
    26→    try:
    27→        r = subprocess.run(['buildozer', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    28→        checks['buildozer'] = r.stdout.strip() or r.stderr.strip()
    29→    except FileNotFoundError:
    30→        checks['buildozer'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - pip install buildozer'
    31→
    32→    try:
    33→        r = subprocess.run(['java', '-version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    34→        checks['java'] = r.stderr.strip().split('\n')[0]
    35→    except FileNotFoundError:
    36→        checks['java'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - apt install openjdk-17-jdk'
    37→
    38→    for k, v in checks.items():
    39→        status = 'OK' if v and 'NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) else 'MISSING'
    40→        print(f'  [{status}] {k}: {v}')
    41→
    42→    return all('NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) for v in checks.values())
    43→
    44→
    45→def build_debug():
    46→    """构建debug APK"""
    47→    if not check_env():
    48→        print('\n环境检查未通过，请安装缺失的依赖')
    49→        return
    50→    print('\n开始构建APK...')
    51→    subprocess.run(['buildozer', 'android', 'debug'], cwd=os.path.dirname(__file__))
    52→
    53→
    54→if __name__ == '__main__':
    55→    if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == 'check':
    56→        check_env()
    57→    else:
    58→        build_debug()
    59→

1→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
     2→<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
     3→
     4→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
     5→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
     6→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
     7→    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />
     8→
     9→    <application
    10→        android:allowBackup="true"
    11→        android:label="配音文字核对宝"
    12→        android:supportsRtl="true"
    13→        android:theme="@style/Theme.VoiceDocCompare">
    14→
    15→        <activity
    16→            android:name=".MainActivity"
    17→            android:exported="true">
    18→            <intent-filter>
    19→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
    20→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
    21→            </intent-filter>
    22→
    23→            <!-- 接收微信分享的音频文件 -->
    24→            <intent-filter>
    25→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    26→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    27→                <data android:mimeType="audio/*" />
    28→            </intent-filter>
    29→
    30→            <!-- 接收微信分享的文档文件 -->
    31→            <intent-filter>
    32→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    33→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    34→                <data android:mimeType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" />
    35→            </intent-filter>
    36→            <intent-filter>
    37→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    38→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    39→                <data android:mimeType="application/msword" />
    40→            </intent-filter>
    41→            <intent-filter>
    42→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
    43→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    44→                <data android:mimeType="text/plain" />
    45→            </intent-filter>
    46→
    47→            <!-- 接收多文件分享 -->
    48→            <intent-filter>
    49→                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND_MULTIPLE" />
    50→                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
    51→                <data android:mimeType="*/*" />
    52→            </intent-filter>
    53→        </activity>
    54→    </application>
    55→</manifest>
